task_description: Create a persistent game system with SQLite storage, a games lobby UI for resuming active games and replaying finished games, and a step-by-step replay viewer with controls for navigating through game history including jumps to kami phases and battles.

verification.summary: npm run build passes cleanly. No test suite exists in this project. Server starts and creates SQLite DB. Three review iterations performed; all critical bugs (API contract mismatches, field name mismatches, kami/battle jump logic) were fixed. Final v3 review: APPROVED.
